tags.description: Concreted cairn memorialising Matthew Flinders and his naming of Observation Island in 1802. Erected by crew of the HMAS Geranium in 1923.
tags.name: Matthew Flinders Memorial
tags.note: Concreted cairn memorialising Matthew Flinders and his naming of Observation Island in 1802. Erected by crew of the HMAS Geranium in 1923.
